basic_info.description: My name is Ahmet İlboga. I have been interested in software since I was young and I have been trying to improve myself in this field since I met computers. My computer is like a friend to me; I bring my projects to life with it. My software adventure started with learning HTML and CSS. Then I met Python and databases. I developed Desktop applications and Web applications using libraries such as Tkinter, Django and Flask. I want to progress in the field of web development and that’s why I’m learning JavaScript and related technologies. I hope to discover more things on this passionate journey.

projects.title: Library Management Application
projects.description: I have developed a library automation system that I developed for my school in high school and which is also my first project

projects.title: Cv Maker Web App
projects.description: I have developed a web application that will allow people to easily and quickly create a resume and download it as a pdf. However, due to my inexperience, the project did not go the way I wanted. I couldn't finish the project with many Mistakes

projects.title: Color Flipper
projects.description: A tiny web application that randomly generates colors

projects.title: TODO List Mini App
projects.description: I have developed a Todo List application that I developed as a finishing project of my JavaScript training course

projects.title: Video In Search
projects.description: With this application, it is a Flask project that finds out which parts of the video you are looking for by searching for words in the video to quickly reach the places you want to watch in videos. However, it is not available at the moment because I used an AI api when developing the project. and I've filled up my Free Token usage limit.

projects.title: MarkDownHub
projects.description: This application is a markdown tutorial site. Thanks to the simple design of this site, you will be able to focus on learning markdown. And I divided the tutorial into classes. at the end of each lesson, a surprise question awaits you so that you can reinforce what you understand. I also created an Editorial page. on this page, you will be able to type in your markdown codes and quickly see how they look.
